hero.title: About Reno Stars
hero.subtitle: Built on experience, not just in construction, but in understanding the renovation industry from both sides.

journey.title: About Reno Stars
journey.body:
Reno Stars was built on experience. Not just in construction but in understanding the renovation industry from both sides.

Before founding Reno Stars in 2021, our team spent years working on renovation platforms, connecting homeowners with contractors. We have seen thousands of projects from start to finish, and more importantly, we have seen where things go wrong.

We understand the common frustrations homeowners face: quotes that grow with hidden items, poor communication and delayed responses, uncertain timelines, and inconsistent workmanship due to unstable crews. These are not rare issues. They are industry norms. That is exactly why Reno Stars was created.
journey.lead: Reno Stars was built on experience, not just in construction, but in understanding the renovation industry from both sides.
journey.context: Before founding Reno Stars in 2021, our team spent years working on renovation platforms, connecting homeowners with contractors. We have seen thousands of projects from start to finish, and more importantly, we have seen where things go wrong.
journey.painPointsTitle: We understand the common frustrations homeowners face.
painPoints: Quotes that look attractive at first but grow with hidden items later.
Uncertain timelines and projects dragging on.
Inconsistent workmanship due to unstable crews.
journey.conclusion: These are not rare issues. They are industry norms. That is exactly why Reno Stars was created.

offer.title: A More Structured, Transparent Approach

kitchen.title: Kitchen Renovation
kitchen.desc: Custom cabinetry, countertops, backsplashes, and complete kitchen transformations tailored to your lifestyle.

bathroom.title: Bathroom Renovation
bathroom.desc: Modern fixtures, tile work, vanities, and spa-inspired designs that maximize your space.

wholeHouse.title: Whole House Renovation
wholeHouse.desc: Comprehensive home remodels including structural work, flooring, lighting, and finishing touches.

commercial.title: Commercial Renovation
commercial.desc: Professional commercial spaces designed for functionality, compliance, and lasting impressions.

offer.body: We are also continuously developing internal construction and inspection standards to further improve consistency and quality.
offer.lead: We did not just start another renovation company. We rebuilt the process.
offer.goal: From the beginning, our goal has been simple. Make renovation predictable, transparent, and stress free.
offer.systemTitle: Every project is supported by a structured system.

systemItems.title: Detailed Contracts
systemItems.desc: Our quotes clearly define scope, responsibilities, and key materials. A typical bathroom renovation may include over 20 clearly listed items, so you know exactly what is included and what is not.

systemItems.title: Clear Payment Milestones
systemItems.desc: Payments are tied to progress. Each stage is completed and reviewed before moving forward, with no surprises.

systemItems.title: Dedicated Coordination
systemItems.desc: Our office team responds quickly, helps with material selection, and ensures nothing gets lost in communication.

systemItems.title: Reliable Scheduling
systemItems.desc: We do not overbook. Your project moves forward as planned, not when it is convenient for us.

systemItems.title: Quality and Waterproofing Standards
systemItems.desc: We clearly specify materials, and application areas, especially for critical elements like waterproofing.

values.title: Managing Details and Expectations

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.desc: We keep our promises and communicate honestly at every stage. No hidden fees, no scope creep, just clear agreements and follow-through.

quality.title: Quality Craftsmanship
quality.desc: Every detail matters. We specify materials upfront, apply proven techniques, and continuously develop internal standards to deliver results that last.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.desc: Detailed contracts with 20+ line items, payment milestones tied to progress, and regular updates, so you always know exactly where your project stands.

satisfaction.title: Client Satisfaction
satisfaction.desc: We do not just complete projects, we manage them. Quick responses, proactive communication, and full accountability from start to finish.

values.body:
Renovation involves many moving parts, from materials to scheduling. While we take great care in planning and coordination, certain factors such as supplier timelines can occasionally be outside of our direct control.

What we can guarantee is our response. We communicate early, adjust quickly, and keep our clients informed at every stage, so there are no surprises and no uncertainty. Our goal is not to promise a perfect process, but to deliver a well-managed one.
values.lead: Renovation involves many moving parts, from materials to scheduling. While we take great care in planning and coordination, certain factors such as supplier timelines can occasionally be outside of our direct control.
values.guarantee: What we can guarantee is our response.
guaranteeItems: We communicate early, adjust quickly, and keep our clients informed at every stage, so there are no surprises and no uncertainty.
values.closing: Our goal is not to promise a perfect process, but to deliver a well managed one.

whyUs.title: Built for Homeowners Who Value Peace of Mind
whyUs.body:
We are not the lowest-priced option, and we do not aim to be. Our clients choose us because they want a clear process, honest communication, reliable timelines, and a team that takes responsibility.

We specialize in full home renovations, kitchens, bathrooms, and commercial projects, where coordination, detail, and reliability make all the difference. We approach every project with one simple mindset: treat every home as if it were our own. Because in the end, renovation is not just about building a space, it is about building trust.
whyUs.lead: We are not the lowest priced option, and we do not aim to be.
whyUs.chooseTitle: Our clients choose us because they want
whyUs.specialise: We specialize in full home renovations, kitchens, bathrooms, and commercial projects, where coordination, detail, and reliability make all the difference.

areas.title: Service Areas
areas.description: We proudly serve homeowners across Metro Vancouver and the Fraser Valley, bringing quality renovation services to communities throughout British Columbia.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How long has Reno Stars been in business?
faq.a1: Reno Stars has over {years} years of combined experience in the Vancouver renovation industry. Our team has completed hundreds of projects across Metro Vancouver, from small bathroom updates to full-scale whole house renovations.
faq.a2: Yes, we are fully licensed with up to $5 million in CGL (Commercial General Liability) insurance and active WCB (WorkSafeBC) coverage. CGL protects your property during the renovation, while WCB ensures all workers on your job site are covered. We also provide up to a 3-year warranty on our work.
faq.a3: We serve all of Metro Vancouver and the Fraser Valley, including Vancouver, Richmond, Burnaby, Surrey, Coquitlam, North Vancouver, West Vancouver, Delta, Langley, Maple Ridge, New Westminster, and Port Moody.
faq.q4: How do I get started with a renovation project?
faq.a4: Getting started is easy! Simply contact us via phone, email, or our online form to schedule a free consultation. We'll discuss your vision, assess your space, and provide a detailed quote tailored to your needs and budget.
faq.q5: What makes Reno Stars different from other Vancouver renovation contractors?
faq.a5: We rebuilt the renovation process from the ground up. Before starting Reno Stars, our team spent years on renovation platforms and saw where things consistently went wrong. Our structured approach, detailed contracts, milestone-based payments, dedicated coordination, and reliable scheduling, addresses the real pain points homeowners face. We are not the cheapest option, but we are the most accountable one.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Renovation?
cta.body: Ready to experience a renovation process built around transparency, reliability, and your peace of mind? Contact us today for a free, detailed quote, and discover why homeowners across Metro Vancouver trust Reno Stars.

philosophy.title: Our Philosophy
philosophy.lead: We approach every project with one simple mindset.
philosophy.quote: Treat every home as if it were our own.
philosophy.closing: Because in the end, renovation is not just about building a space, it is about building trust.
